feed.title: Language and Semiotic Studies
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Language and Semiotic Studies (De Gruyter)

entry.title: The medium, the gate of perception and how we recognize signs
entry.summary: Authors: Tony Jappy DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lass-2025-0070 Pages: Page range: 167-189

entry.title: The principle of differentiation and the intersemiotic relations of Chinese characters
entry.summary: Authors: Hua Meng DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lass-2025-0067 Pages: Page range: 190-210

entry.title: Unheard melodies and emotional peaks inLet It GoandShow Yourself: a multimodal sentiment analysis
entry.summary: Authors: Nashwa Elyamany, Yasser Omar Youssef, Manar Mohamed Hafez DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lass-2025-0032 Pages: Page range: 211-239

entry.title: Credence, attribution, and creativity in the construction of literary meaning with generative artificial intelligence
entry.summary: Authors: Sergio Torres-Martínez DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lass-2024-0072 Pages: Page range: 240-280

entry.title: When the language of smoking says it all: a semiotic-psychoanalytic decoding of the American filmGolda
entry.summary: Authors: May Samir El-Falaky, Heba Mohamed Abdelaziz, Alshaymaa Mohamed Ahmed, Yara Abdelsamie DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lass-2025-0020 Pages: Page range: 281-311

entry.title: Ideologies, qualia, and rhematization: unpacking the semiotic process of experiencing Beijinghutong’s “oldness” quality
entry.summary: Authors: Peng Zhao, Wei Dai DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lass-2025-0038 Pages: Page range: 312-333

entry.title: History, sense and value of a word: ‘semioetica’
entry.summary: Authors: Dario Dellino DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/lass-2025-0012 Pages: Page range: 334-352
